description: Qwen3-1.7B Q4_K_M vs Gemma-3-1B Q4_K_M head-to-head benchmark. WikiText-2 perplexity + llama-bench speed.

benchmark_config.ppl_note: Instruct-tuned models scored over raw WikiText text — absolute PPL inflated by = Heading = markup and chat formatting mismatch. Use for relative comparison only.

comparison.ppl_note: Confidence intervals do not overlap (±0.48 vs ±0.65). 27% lower perplexity is real quality, not noise.
comparison.overall_verdict: Qwen3-1.7B Q4_K_M sweeps every quality+speed metric. Gemma-3-1B's only edge is 0.54 GB less VRAM — irrelevant at 27% GTX 1660 Ti utilisation. Qwen3-1.7B is the stronger pick.
comparison.vram_headroom_note: Both models fit in 6 GB with ~4 GB headroom. VRAM tradeoff doesn't matter on this device.
